demo_notes: Unconfirmed-twin disclosure: the confirmed commit-body decision emits the finding; the near-duplicate PR-thread candidate is named in degraded reasons instead of double-reporting.

expected_findings.suggested_repair: Keep redaction in place; replay failed charges from the redacted stream instead of logging raw card numbers.
expected_findings.summary: The diff logs the raw line and returns it unredacted in src/worker/logging.py, contradicting the confirmed PAN redaction decision.

patch:
diff --git a/src/worker/logging.py b/src/worker/logging.py
index 5656565..7878787 100644
--- a/src/worker/logging.py
+++ b/src/worker/logging.py
@@ -1,6 +1,7 @@
 """Worker log pipeline with PAN redaction."""


-def redact(line: str) -> str:
-    return line.replace("4111111111111111", "****1111")
+def redact(line: str) -> str:
+    # debugging: log the raw line so we can replay failed charges
+    print(line)
+    return line
scripted_degraded_reasons: The PR-thread decision 'PAN redaction mandatory in src/worker/logging.py' also conflicts with this diff, but its status is 'candidate', so no finding was emitted for it (unconfirmed-twin disclosure).
title: A confirmed redaction rule fires; its unconfirmed twin is disclosed
